creator: billf@chimesnet.com
text:
On Sat, Oct 21, 2000 at 02:27:14PM -0400, matt@gsicomp.on.ca wrote:
> --- sntop/pkg-descr.orig	Sat Oct 21 14:24:53 2000
> +++ sntop/pkg-descr	Sat Oct 21 14:24:57 2000
> @@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
>  This is a port of sntop, a curses-based utility that uses fping (ping can be
>  used as well) to determine connectivity of remote network hosts on a regular interval.  Features include HTML generation and a secure terminal.
>  
> -WWW:  http://sntop.sourceforge.com
> +WWW:  http://sntop.sourceforge.net

Actually, it should be http://sntop.sourceforge.net/

-- 
Bill Fumerola - Network Architect, BOFH / Chimes, Inc.
                billf@chimesnet.com / billf@FreeBSD.org
